name: Finisher
description: Determines outcomes when a wrestler goes for a finishing move

entries.templateText: {WRESTLER_1} connects with their finisher dead center — {WRESTLER_2} crumbles and the referee counts a clean three.
{WRESTLER_1} hits their finisher flawlessly from the top rope, turning {WRESTLER_2} inside out for the definitive victory.
{WRESTLER_1} hooks the arms of {WRESTLER_2} and plants them deep into the canvas with their finisher, securing an immediate pin.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers their finisher with devastating impact, knocking {WRESTLER_2} completely unconscious to win the match.
{WRESTLER_1} hoists {WRESTLER_2} up, walks around the ring to show off, and blasts them with their finisher for a dominant win.
{WRESTLER_1} catches a mid-air {WRESTLER_2} and seamlessly transitions into their finisher, ending the match in absolute style.
{WRESTLER_1} locks in their submission finisher, wrenching back with maximum torque until {WRESTLER_2} has no choice but to tap out.
{WRESTLER_1} strikes with blinding speed, hitting their running finisher on {WRESTLER_2} to capture the standard three-count.
{WRESTLER_1} cuts off a desperation comeback by {WRESTLER_2}, hitting their finisher out of nowhere to pick up the win.
{WRESTLER_1} hits their signature high-impact finisher, pinning {WRESTLER_2} while staring directly at the commentary table.
{WRESTLER_1} hits the finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} gets a shoulder up at 2.99, causing the entire arena to explode in disbelief.
{WRESTLER_1} hits their finisher flush, but {WRESTLER_2} gets their foot onto the bottom rope at the absolute last microsecond.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers the finisher, but a sluggish cover allows {WRESTLER_2} to dramatically kick out at two and a half.
{WRESTLER_1} covers after their finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} powerfully powers out of the pin, shocking {WRESTLER_1} to their core.
{WRESTLER_1} plants {WRESTLER_2} with their finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} kicks out and instantly fires up, fueling a massive crowd chant.
{WRESTLER_1} scales the ropes to mock the fans before covering, giving {WRESTLER_2} just enough recovery time to kick out at two.
{WRESTLER_1} looks down in absolute shock as {WRESTLER_2} barely twitches a shoulder off the canvas to break up the three-count.
{WRESTLER_1} hits their finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} absorbs the impact and kicks out at one, completely paralyzing {WRESTLER_1} with fear.
{WRESTLER_1} tries for a lazy one-hand cover after their finisher, and {WRESTLER_2} dramatically kicks out to keep their hopes alive.
{WRESTLER_1} connects with the finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} acts on pure survival instinct, rolling a shoulder up just as the referee's hand falls.
{WRESTLER_1} hoists them up, but {WRESTLER_2} slips down their back, trapping the leg and locking in a devastating submission hold.
{WRESTLER_1} jumps for their finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} counters in mid-air, rolling over into a deep, agonizing armbar.
{WRESTLER_1} attempts their submission finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} counters the grip and applies their own signature chokehold instead.
{WRESTLER_1} charges forward, but {WRESTLER_2} side-steps the finisher, grabbing the ankle and applying an ankle lock center ring.
{WRESTLER_1} hooks the arms, but {WRESTLER_2} uses a massive back body drop to counter, immediately transitioning into a submission.
{WRESTLER_1} tries to apply their finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} rolls through the momentum, locking in a high-torque leg lace.
{WRESTLER_1} sets up the finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} catches the arm, spinning underneath into a crossface that leaves {WRESTLER_1} screaming.
{WRESTLER_1} runs into the corner for their finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} catches them, slamming them down and locking in a sharpshooter.
{WRESTLER_2} taunts {WRESTLER_1}, hits them with their own finisher, and stands tall as the crowd roars at the ultimate disrespect.
{WRESTLER_1} is stunned as {WRESTLER_2} perfectly executes the finisher of {WRESTLER_1}, nearly securing a shocking pinfall victory.
{WRESTLER_2} ducks a clothesline and hits a textbook imitation of the finisher of {WRESTLER_1}, sending a clear psychological message.
{WRESTLER_1} sets up their move, but {WRESTLER_2} reverses it and hits the finisher of {WRESTLER_1} on them instead, leaving them dazed.
{WRESTLER_2} steals the spotlight by locking {WRESTLER_1} in their own signature submission finisher, mocking them mercilessly.
{WRESTLER_1} misses a strike, allowing {WRESTLER_2} to lift them up and hit the finisher of {WRESTLER_1} directly onto the hard canvas.
{WRESTLER_2} plays possum, then surprises an overconfident {WRESTLER_1} by delivering the finisher of {WRESTLER_1} to a massive crowd pop.
{WRESTLER_1} takes too long setting up, enabling {WRESTLER_2} to counter and execute a flawless version of the finisher of {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} whiffs completely on their high-flying finisher, crashing violently through the announcer's table at ringside.
{WRESTLER_1} tries for their finisher, but {WRESTLER_2} moves out of the way, causing {WRESTLER_1} to smash into the steel ring post.
{WRESTLER_1} slips on the top rope while attempting their finisher, landing awkwardly and clutching their knee in agonizing pain.
{WRESTLER_1} charges for their finisher but misses completely, tumbling over the top rope and splatting hard onto the concrete floor.
{WRESTLER_1} springboards for their finisher, but a technical botch causes them to crash face-first into the canvas.
{WRESTLER_1} goes for the finisher, but their body gives out from exhaustion, causing them to collapse short of hitting {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} throws a running strike that {WRESTLER_2} ducks, causing {WRESTLER_1} to crash chest-first into the turnbuckle.
{WRESTLER_1} attempts their submission finisher, but completely loses their grip, giving {WRESTLER_2} an open lane to recover.
An aggressive manager jumps onto the apron to distract {WRESTLER_1}, causing them to break their hold and miss hitting {WRESTLER_2}.
A rival wrestler storms the ring, distracting {WRESTLER_1} just long enough for {WRESTLER_2} to roll them up from behind.
The lights flash dramatically in the arena, breaking the focus of {WRESTLER_1} and ruining their finisher attempt on {WRESTLER_2}.
An associate of {WRESTLER_2} grabs the leg of {WRESTLER_1} from outside, stalling the finisher and swinging the match's momentum.
{WRESTLER_1} argues with a loud fan at ringside, completely blowing their window of opportunity to hit the finisher on {WRESTLER_2}.
An illegal weapon is tossed into the ring, distracting {WRESTLER_1} and allowing {WRESTLER_2} to hit a low blow out of the referee's sight.
{WRESTLER_1} is distracted by a referee bump, turning around right into a sudden, opportunistic steel chair shot from {WRESTLER_2}.
Music plays over the PA system to distract {WRESTLER_1}, giving {WRESTLER_2} a massive opening to escape the finisher.
{WRESTLER_2} counters the finisher with a desperation lariat that leaves both wrestlers completely wiped out on the canvas.
{WRESTLER_2} uses a sudden jawbreaker to break out of the finisher of {WRESTLER_1}, buying precious seconds to breathe.
{WRESTLER_2} throws a blind, wild elbow that strikes {WRESTLER_1} right in the eye, breaking up the finisher sequence instantly.
{WRESTLER_2} drops down and hits a desperation low blow while the referee's back is turned, completely neutralizing {WRESTLER_1}.
Both wrestlers charge the ropes and execute simultaneous crossbody blocks, resulting in a dramatic double-down.
A massive mid-air collision occurs as both wrestlers attempt running finishers at the exact same moment, knocking both out cold.
Both wrestlers hit high-impact strikes at the same time, falling backward onto the canvas as the referee begins a double ten-count.
Both wrestlers collapse from sheer physical exhaustion after a grueling chain of countered finishers, unable to cover each other.
